level_signals: Expected to lead change management and serve as primary point of contact

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 5+ years of product management experience, ideally within fintech, lending, or platform-side roles.
must_haves.qualifier: ideally within fintech, lending, or platform-side roles

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Strong understanding of system architecture; ability to opine on technical choices and understand the trade-offs of different technical frameworks.
Excellent communication skills—able to engage seamlessly with technical, analytical, and business audiences.
Fluency with SQL and data analysis; experience using data to address customer pain points and iterate into solutions.
Proven ability to influence beyond your immediate team and foster cross-functional alignment in a matrixed environment.
Strong organizational skills with a track record of running technical sprints and complex product launches.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Direct experience building or scaling underwriting/decisioning platforms.
Knowledge of credit risk modeling and credit bureau data integrations.
Experience working with LLMs or generative AI

explicitly_excluded: Remote work from Hawaii or Alaska (due to insurance coverage issues)

scope.surface: Core underwriting and decisioning platforms for SoFi's lending products
scope.business_model: B2C fintech / national bank — personal finance and lending products
core_responsibilities: Define and drive the roadmap for core underwriting and decisioning platforms
Drive tech capabilities and stakeholder buy-in across multiple organizations (Risk, Engineering, Legal, Compliance)
Lead technical sprints, manage a complex backlog, and prioritize initiatives
Translate nuanced risk and policy requirements into clear technical specifications for engineering teams
Leverage SQL to track performance and inform prioritization
Drive quality and velocity improvements and contribute to PM best practices
Serve as the primary point of contact for underwriting technology

green_flags: Clear product ownership area (underwriting/decisioning infrastructure) with specific partners named
Explicitly names SQL as a required tool — concrete technical bar
Nice-to-have list is genuine (LLMs, credit risk modeling) rather than recycled must-haves
SoFi is a scaled national bank with real lending volume — meaningful product impact stated
red_flags: Base pay range is referenced but not disclosed in the JD body — candidates cannot assess compensation without follow-up
Location type is unclear — JD mentions Hawaii/Alaska exclusion implying remote is possible, but no formal remote/hybrid/onsite designation is stated
Visa sponsorship and work authorization requirements are not mentioned
5+ years is listed with 'ideally within fintech/lending' qualifier, making it ambiguous whether non-lending PM experience is genuinely acceptable

seniority.manages_people (inferred as false; no direct report language present)

location.remote_us_eligible (inferred as true from Hawaii/Alaska exclusion language)

scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not stated verbatim)

ambiguities: Location type is not explicitly stated as remote, hybrid, or onsite. The JD mentions inability to accommodate remote work from Hawaii or Alaska, suggesting remote is generally permitted, but no formal policy is described.

The 5+ years experience requirement includes 'ideally within fintech, lending, or platform-side roles' — the word 'ideally' suggests soft preference, but it is listed under 'What you'll need' (must-haves section), creating ambiguity about severity. Treated as hard with qualifier noted.
Compensation range is referenced ('The base pay range for this role is listed below') but no numbers appear in the extracted JD body.
